summary: Bash scripts follow best practices well (set -euo pipefail, quoted vars, error handling), but deliverable is incomplete and non-functional: workflow references missing fixtures/ and tests/aggregate.bats files (lines 19, 38, 40 of workflow) that don't exist. Workflow's action pinning violates security best practice (should use commit SHA, not v4 tag). run_act_tests.sh only covers 2 test cases when workflow has 5+ assertion steps. Float arithmetic via awk (aggregate.sh:76) is fragile. Cannot execute as-is.
